overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a downtown Los Santos sidewalk. The character passes pedestrians, mailboxes, and a large delivery truck while approaching an intersection with classical and modern architecture visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with classical bank building

events.description: character passes the group of three pedestrians on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a classical building with large columns, overtaking a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing and conversing near the building entrance

entered.detail: large building with tall stone columns and green and yellow trim
mature tree with dense canopy growing in sidewalk cutout
cluster of downtown high-rise buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a downtown sidewalk beside a classical bank building with imposing columns. Early in the segment, the character passes a group of three pedestrians standing near the building entrance. A large tree grows from the sidewalk ahead, and the distant city skyline is visible across the multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk approaching intersection with urban furniture

events.description: large Big G Goods delivery truck drives past and stops at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past mailboxes and trash cans, approaching a large stopped truck at the intersection

notable_agents.action: large box truck with Big G Goods branding driving along the street and stopping at the intersection

entered.detail: pair of blue USPS-style postal mailboxes on the sidewalk
large white delivery truck with red Big G Goods Store Merchants branding
modern building with elevated walkway or bridge connecting sections

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk past urban furniture including blue mailboxes and trash cans. A large Big G Goods delivery truck drives past on the right and stops at the intersection ahead. The classical bank building recedes into the background on the left while a modern building with an overpass structure becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown intersection approach with traffic signals

events.description: character passes the stopped truck and enters the wider intersection area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection with traffic lights, passing the truck and approaching a large building complex

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal gantry spanning the intersection
large modern building with plaza entrance and multiple stories
cluster of palm trees visible across the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the delivery truck and enters a wider intersection area. Traffic lights hang overhead at the crossroads ahead, and a large modern building with a plaza entrance dominates the view. The classical architecture gives way to modern downtown structures as the character approaches the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a downtown sidewalk that transitions from a classical architectural setting to a modern urban intersection. It begins beside a bank building with imposing columns, passing a small group of pedestrians and a sidewalk tree while the city skyline looms in the distance. As the character continues forward, the classical facade recedes to make room for urban fixtures like blue mailboxes and trash cans, just as a large Big G Goods delivery truck drives past and comes to a halt. The scene then opens into a wider intersection area, shifting the focus from the old bank to a dominant modern building with a plaza entrance. Finally, the camera moves past the stopped truck toward the crossroads, where overhead traffic lights mark the complete transition into the modern downtown core.
